mapper.select: SELECT id, category, name, contact, manager, notes FROM sf_partner ORDER BY category ASC, name ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sf_partner (category, name, contact, manager, notes) VALUES (#{category}, #{name}, #{contact}, #{manager}, #{notes})
mapper.update: UPDATE sf_partner SET category = #{category}, name = #{name}, contact = #{contact}, manager = #{manager}, notes = #{notes} WHERE id = #{id}
